description_long: This is a polygonal, barrel-shaped cup with a dark wooden texture and two thick, black horizontal bands encircling its body. The cup features a prominent, angular metallic handle attached to one side, providing a sturdy grip. On the front, there are two stylized white eye motifs outlined in black, giving the cup a distinctive and somewhat whimsical appearance. The interior appears hollow and is likely made of the same dark wood as the exterior. The surface finish is matte with visible wood grain, and the handle has a metallic sheen. The cup is medium-sized, suitable for holding beverages, and its robust construction suggests durability.
description: A dark wooden, barrel-shaped cup with a metallic handle and two white eye motifs on the front. The surface is matte with visible wood grain and black bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two white eye motifs and the angular metallic handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the metallic handle centered and no eye motifs visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and both eye motifs visible on the cup's body.
description_view_3: Back view with no handle or eye motifs visible, showing only the wooden texture and black bands.
